sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for puzzle game

special_mechanics.name: Paddle Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a paddle at the lower end of a conveyor belt using a four-position joystick. Paddle can move left or right to catch colored tiles.

special_mechanics.name: Tile Drop Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Pressing button causes topmost tile on paddle to fall directly downward into the well below, as long as that column is not full.

special_mechanics.name: Tile Flip
special_mechanics.description: Pushing up on joystick flips the topmost tile on the paddle a short distance up the conveyor.

special_mechanics.name: Conveyor Acceleration
special_mechanics.description: Pulling down on joystick accelerates the motion of tiles moving down the conveyor.

tier_notes: Tier 3 qualitative data. Klax is a puzzle game, not a platformer. No traditional movement physics (gravity, jump, acceleration) apply. Game mechanics focus on tile manipulation within a grid-based system rather than character physics. No sub-pixel precision documented.
